title: Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd!
